understanding.goal_understanding: Win each level by positioning every selectable piece so that all goal tiles marked with a '+' are occupied simultaneously; complete all levels within the per-level step budget to finish the full game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently selected piece is the one at player.position/player.id and is the only piece that responds to MOVE_* actions; movement occurs on a grid (3 pixels per cell) and can be blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects, though the movement.*_blocked flags are only hints and do not guarantee failure. Some adjacent objects (e.g., blocks) can be pushable, moving together with the selected piece when pushed in the movement direction as long as space allows, while walls generally prevent movement/pushing. When multiple selectables exist, control is switched using CLICK with the exact pixel-coordinate position of the target selectable; this changes which piece subsequent MOVE_* actions affect.
